The property comes fully furnished, providing a complete move-in-ready experience. On the ground floor, youll find a spacious bedroom with an attached western-style bathroom, complete with a geyser. This level also includes a cozy living room, a modular kitchen equipped with a chimney and piped gas connection, a dining room, and a dedicated pooja room. The kitchen features an attached utility area for added convenience.The first floor houses three well-appointed bedrooms, each with its own attached western-style bathroom and geyser. This floor also boasts an open family area and three balconies, each attached to a bedroom and offering views of the road.The second floor is designed for both functionality and leisure, featuring a servants room, a drivers room, a gym, and a sit-out area. This level includes two additional washrooms and a large open terrace, perfect for relaxation and outdoor activities. The property is finished with high-quality marble flooring throughout and is designed to be 100 Vastu compliant and west-facing, ensuring positive energy flow and an inviting ambiance. Facilities This luxurious 5 BHK home offers a range of top-notch facilities for ultimate convenience and security. It includes dedicated covered parking spaces to keep your vehicles safe and secure. Residents will enjoy 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup, supported by both UPS and solar power systems, ensuring uninterrupted utility services. The property is well-secured with a professional security guard on duty and comprehensive CCTV surveillance installed throughout the premises.Locality Located in the vibrant area of Reliaable Lavendula, Electronic City, Bangalore, this property enjoys a prime position near the esteemed landmark of Esteem Embalam. The locality boasts excellent connectivity and amenities, with several reputable schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets all situated nearby, ensuring all your daily needs are met.Public transport is readily accessible, with buses and autos providing easy commuting options. Essential services such as banks and ATMs are also conveniently close. The railway station is nearby, enhancing travel options, while the upcoming metro station, just 500 meters away, promises even better connectivity and convenience in the near future.

resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to an exceptional opportunity to own a stunning 3 BHK flat in the desirable location of Yemalur, Bangalore. This property truly offers the best of comfort, convenience, and connectivity in the desirable location of Yemalur, Bangalore.Property specificationsWith a super built-up area of 1771 sqft, this flat is situated on the top floor of a 4-story building, offering privacy and tranquility. Semi-furnished with wardrobes, lights, and fans, this flat is ready to move in and make it your own. Designed to be vaastu compliant and facing east, it invites positive energy and abundant natural light. The flooring is adorned with elegant vitrified tiles, adding a touch of sophistication to the space.This spacious flat boasts 3 bedrooms, providing ample room for comfortable living. Two of the bedrooms have attached bathrooms, while there is an additional common bathroom on the floor. All bathrooms are designed in a western style and are equipped with geysers for hot water supply. Enjoy the luxury of 3 balconies, with 2 attached to the bedrooms and 1 attached to the hall, offering captivating views of the surrounding area.The flat features a well-designed living cum dining area, perfect for entertaining guests or spending quality time with family. Additional storage space is available with a dedicated store room. The modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney, making cooking an effortless and enjoyable experience. The utility area attached to the kitchen adds to the convenience of daily chores.FacilitiesThis property offers covered parking for residents, ensuring the safety and security of their vehicles. Water supply is available from both borewell and corporation sources, ensuring continuous supply. The flat also benefits from 100 power backup, providing uninterrupted electricity. With a security guard and CCTV cameras installed, residents can enjoy peace of mind knowing that their safety is a priority. The building features a lift for easy access to all floors. Residents of this flat have access to a range of amenities, including a club house, gym, and kids play area, ensuring a well-rounded and enjoyable living experience.LocalityLocated opposite the Indian Oil petrol pump, this flat is surrounded by various amenities. Schools and hospitals are within a kilometer radius, providing convenience for families. Malls, supermarkets, banksATMs, and public transportation options are also easily accessible, making everyday life hassle-free. Dont miss out on this incredible opportunity to own a beautiful flat in this thriving neighborhood.

resultList.dtldesc: Located in the heart of Rajaji Nagar 6th Block, Bangalore, this charming 4 BHK Independent Owner Residential House available for sale offers a rare blend of vintage charm and modern convenience. Showcasing its well-planned layout, spacious interiors, and prime location close to major city landmarks, this home is perfect for families looking for a serene yet well-connected living experience.Property Specifications Built 56 years ago and originally allotted by CITB, now BDA, this genuine property stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and timeless architecture. Spread across a generous super built-up area of 1,600 sq. ft., this G1 house is designed to accommodate comfortable family living. The ground floor features two well-sized bedrooms, a spacious living room, a functional kitchen with an attached utility area, and a common bathroom with an Indian-style toilet. Moreover, the first floor houses two independent 1 BHK units, offering excellent flexibility for extended family members or rental income potential. The interiors retain their vintage appeal while providing ample space for personalization. A built-in showcase enhances the aesthetics of the living area, adding a nostalgic touch to the homes character. Additionally, the flooring throughout is classic red oxide, lending an old-world charm to the residence.Facilities This independent house ensures a seamless living experience with essential amenities in place. A 24-hour Corporation water supply guarantees uninterrupted daily convenience, while a 100 power backup facility ensures that residents are never left in the dark. Security is well taken care of with a dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance, ensuring peace of mind for homeowners.Locality Positioned in one of Bangalores most sought-after localities, this home is ideally situated near Prasanna Theatre and GT Mall. Essential facilities such as reputed schools and hospitals are within a 1-2 km radius, making it an excellent choice for families. Additionally, banks and ATM centers are conveniently located close by, ensuring all necessities are within easy reach. Commuting is effortless with buses and autos readily available, and the property is just 300 meters from the nearest metro station. The railway station is a mere 2 km away, and the bustling Majestic area is only 3 km from the residence.
